- [ ] ⬜ **New Suite → dedicated page** (`/suites/new`, `SuiteFlow`) — extract the `SuiteDrawer` **create** path into a routed *details / source* page reusing `suiteTarget.ts` + the run-target editor (PR #246). Removes the drawer's create branch; `Suites.tsx` swaps `setDrawer({open:true})` for `navigate('/suites/new')`.
- [ ] ⬜ **Edit flows → dedicated pages** — unify edit onto the existing create pages via an `:id` route + prefill, reusing the already-extracted form specs (`connectionFormSpec.ts` / `checkForm.ts` / `suiteTarget.ts`): connection edit `/connections/:id/edit` → `ConnectionNew`; suite edit `/suites/:id/edit` → `SuiteFlow`; check edit `/suites/:id/checks/:checkId/edit` → `CheckNew`. **Removes** the `ConnectionDrawer` / `CheckDrawer` / `SuiteDrawer` **edit** drawers; the parent pages drop their `editing` / `drawer` state for `navigate()`. (Dedups with [#204](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/204).)
- [ ] ⬜ **Results drill-down → dedicated route** (`/results/:runId`, `ResultsScreen` detail) — promote the in-page `openRun` `useState` ([Results.tsx:54](../frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx#L54)) to a routed run-detail page with back-nav, per-check results (severity tags + `metric_value` + observed), and CSV/JSON download. Deep-linkable + refreshable (the prototype's `ResultsScreen` flow).
- [ ] ⬜ **Standard error pages (4xx / 5xx)** — an `ErrorState`-based page in the app shell switchable across 400 / 401 / 403 / 404 / 429 / 500 / 502 / 503 / 504; wire it into the router catch-all + the `ErrorBoundary` ([PR #210](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/pull/210)) fallback so render-time + routing failures render in-brand.

**Week 6 total: 2 / 22** _(early credit: Results page scaffold + severity badge colours (PR-C1, the GX-Cloud redesign Phase C); 3 dashboard tasks partially landed — status/provider filters, per-check drill-down, pipeline-runs feed. +6 prototype-adoption tasks added: nav/shell, Dashboard landing page, suite-create page, edit-flows→pages, results drill-down route, error pages.)_

---

## Week 7 — Deployment, hardening & docs

**Exit gate:** Production-ready v1 deployed to Azure, CI/CD live, team onboarded.

### DevOps & deployment (5 tasks — 0/5, 1 partial early)
- [ ] 🟡 Containerise FastAPI + React + Celery + Redis — backend `Dockerfile` + `api`/`worker` compose services landed early ([PR 4a](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/pull/74)); React image + ACR/ACA still pending
- [ ] ⬜ Push images to Azure Container Registry
- [ ] ⬜ Deploy to Azure Container Apps (API + Celery worker) + Azure Static Web App (React UI) — wire CORS middleware for Static-Web-App → Container-Apps cross-origin ([PR #40 nit](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/pull/40)); override hardcoded `dataq:dataq` Postgres creds + all secrets via Container Apps secret refs ([PR #39 nit](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/pull/39))

Components are reproduced with **real antd** — the prototype's framework-free recreations + `_ds_bundle.js` are reference only (per the design README). -- [ ] ⬜ **Edit flows → dedicated pages** — unify edit onto the existing create pages via an `:id` route + prefill, reusing the already-extracted form specs (`connectionFormSpec.ts` / `checkForm.ts` / `suiteTarget.ts`): connection edit `/connections/:id/edit` → `ConnectionNew`; suite edit `/suites/:id/edit` → `SuiteFlow`; check edit `/suites/:id/checks/:checkId/edit` → `CheckNew`. **Removes** the `ConnectionDrawer` / `CheckDrawer` / `SuiteDrawer` **edit** drawers; the parent pages drop their `editing` / `drawer` state for `navigate()`. (Dedups with [#204](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/204).)

-- [ ] ⬜ **Results drill-down → dedicated route** (`/results/:runId`, `ResultsScreen` detail) — promote the in-page `openRun` `useState` ([Results.tsx:54](../frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx#L54)) to a routed run-detail page with back-nav, per-check results (severity tags + `metric_value` + observed), and CSV/JSON download. Deep-linkable + refreshable (the prototype's `ResultsScreen` flow).

-- [ ] ⬜ **Standard error pages (4xx / 5xx)** — an `ErrorState`-based page in the app shell switchable across 400 / 401 / 403 / 404 / 429 / 500 / 502 / 503 / 504; wire it into the router catch-all + the `ErrorBoundary` ([PR #210](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/pull/210)) fallback so render-time + routing failures render in-brand.

+> **Design source — how to open the prototype (read before picking up any task in this track):** the claude.ai/design project **"DataQ Design System"** — `projectId` **`317fec67-2b8a-498c-8f6b-523750916a8d`** (owner Arijit). Read it with the **`/design-sync`** skill / **`DesignSync`** tool over the claude.ai login: `DesignSync method=list_files projectId=…`, then `method=get_file path=<…>`. Key paths: **`readme.md`** = the canonical spec (voice · color · type · spacing · status model · component/template manifest); **`guidelines/*.card.html`** = foundation specimen cards; **`templates/app/*.jsx`** = framework-free recreations of each screen; **`components/<group>/*.jsx`** = the component recreations; **`tokens/*.css`** = raw token values; **`uploads/DESIGN.md`** = the *superseded teal* brief (ignore for palette). ⚠️ The hosted share link `https://api.anthropic.com/v1/design/h/SVkQJqee7xsc2FNWVOsnIQ` returns **404** — reach the prototype via DesignSync, not the link. The `.jsx` / `_ds_bundle.js` are **reference only** — build in real antd reading `theme.ts`.

+- [ ] ⬜ **Nav / shell restructure** — add **Dashboard** as the landing entry; reorder the sider to **Dashboard · Connections · Suites · Results · Profile**; add the footer group **Settings · Admin · Documentation** (Admin/Settings land in Week 7). Change the login redirect `/` → `/dashboard` (was `/connections`). Touches `App.tsx` `NAV_ITEMS` + `<Routes>` only — the nav already prefix-matches ([#192](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/192)). _Design ref: `templates/app/AppShell.jsx` (white header + light sider + footer nav) + readme §"What's in here → Templates → `templates/app`" (the sidebar + footer item lists)._

+- [ ] ⬜ **Enhanced Monitoring Dashboard page** (`/dashboard`, `DashboardScreen`) — the new landing screen that **hosts the existing Week-6 dashboard widgets** (health-score stat cards, 7-day quality-trend chart, per-suite performance bars, recent-runs table). This is the **page home** for the "Health score stat cards", "Per-suite pass/fail bars" and "Per-check historical trend chart" tasks above — build them here rather than on `/results`. **Prereq:** a chart-library decision (antd ships no charts → `@ant-design/charts` or `recharts`; runs through `pnpm audit` + bundle-size gate → ADR-light note). Render only backend-backed KPIs (see the W7 *KPI honesty pass*). _Design ref: `templates/app/DashboardScreen.jsx`; components `data/MetricCard.jsx`, `data/Card.jsx`, `feedback/ProgressBar.jsx`, `data/DataTable.jsx`; readme §"Templates" (Enhanced Monitoring — KPIs · Quality Trends · Suite Performance · Recent Runs)._

+- [ ] ⬜ **New Suite → dedicated page** (`/suites/new`, `SuiteFlow`) — extract the `SuiteDrawer` **create** path into a routed *details / source* page reusing `suiteTarget.ts` + the run-target editor (PR #246). Removes the drawer's create branch; `Suites.tsx` swaps `setDrawer({open:true})` for `navigate('/suites/new')`. _Design ref: `templates/app/SuiteFlow.jsx` (New Suite → Details/Source) → `CheckFlow.jsx` (Define Rules); readme §"Templates" full-page-flows note._

+- [ ] ⬜ **Edit flows → dedicated pages** — unify edit onto the existing create pages via an `:id` route + prefill, reusing the already-extracted form specs (`connectionFormSpec.ts` / `checkForm.ts` / `suiteTarget.ts`): connection edit `/connections/:id/edit` → `ConnectionNew`; suite edit `/suites/:id/edit` → `SuiteFlow`; check edit `/suites/:id/checks/:checkId/edit` → `CheckNew`. **Removes** the `ConnectionDrawer` / `CheckDrawer` / `SuiteDrawer` **edit** drawers; the parent pages drop their `editing` / `drawer` state for `navigate()`. (Dedups with [#204](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/204).) _Design ref: `templates/app/ConnectionFlow.jsx` (Configuration), `SuiteFlow.jsx`, `CheckFlow.jsx` — the create flows; edit reuses the same page shape, prefilled._

Deep-linkable + refreshable (the prototype's `ResultsScreen` flow). _Design ref: `templates/app/ResultsScreen.jsx`; readme §"Templates" (Results → click a run → Run detail with per-check results + CSV/JSON download)._

312	
313	### Prototype adoption — backend-gated screens + final polish (added — not in original roadmap)
314	> Closes out the prototype after the Week-6 structural pass: the two screens that need backend (**Admin**, **Settings**) plus the final visual-fidelity pass to the design-system guidelines. Admin needs a real **workspace-admin** authz concept (today `admin` is per-suite only) — the prototype's client-side "View as" switch is **not** used (real authz is server-side, CLAUDE.md §11).
315	- [ ] ⬜ **Backend: workspace-admin list-all endpoint** — `GET /admin/suites` · `/admin/users` · `/admin/access` (all-suites / all-users / access overview) behind a new **workspace-admin** authz check (distinct from the per-suite `view < edit < admin < owner` ladder in `suite_authz`). Backward-compatible additive surface; the long-standing **backend block** for the Admin page. _Unblocks the Week-4 ⬜ "Admin page" task._
316	- [ ] ⬜ **Admin control centre page** (`/admin`, `AdminScreen`) — all suites / users / access overview on the new endpoint, with a **real 403** for non-admins (server-driven, via the workspace-admin check — *not* a client "View as" toggle). _Closes the Week-4 "Admin page — list all suites, all users, access overview" task._
317	- [ ] ⬜ **Workspace Settings page** (`/settings`, `SettingsScreen`) — the app-shell settings screen. **No settings/preferences backend exists today** (only the `v1/` routers), so v1 ships the page shell + only controls that map to a real backend (e.g. Teams alert webhook config once the Week-6 `ResultPublisher` notification-config UI lands); everything else renders as a clearly-labelled placeholder until a settings API exists. Backend-gated.
318	- [ ] ⬜ **Dashboard KPI honesty pass** — the Dashboard renders only metrics with a real data model: pass-rate, run counts, and `metric_value`-backed trends (ADR 0012 seam). **Omit "anomalies detected"** (the `anomaly` monitor-kind is reserved, not implemented in v1) and **"avg. time to resolution"** (there is no incident/resolution model). Re-introduce when the monitor kinds / model exist (post-v1 Theme A).
319	- [ ] ⬜ **Visual-fidelity pass to the design spec** — self-hosted **Inter** + **JetBrains Mono** `@font-face` (if not already wired), motion tokens (120–180ms ease on bg/border/shadow, 0.5px press nudge), the 2px indigo focus ring, hover elevation on interactive cards, and empty/loading states — matched to the prototype's `guidelines/*` foundation cards. Keep using **semantic tokens** so post-v1 dark mode inherits for free.
320	
321	**Week 7 total: 0 / 34** _(+5 prototype-adoption tasks: workspace-admin endpoint, Admin page, Settings page, Dashboard KPI honesty pass, visual-fidelity pass)_

### Prototype adoption — backend-gated screens + final polish (added — not in original roadmap)
> Closes out the prototype after the Week-6 structural pass: the two screens that need backend (**Admin**, **Settings**) plus the final visual-fidelity pass to the design-system guidelines. Admin needs a real **workspace-admin** authz concept (today `admin` is per-suite only) — the prototype's client-side "View as" switch is **not** used (real authz is server-side, CLAUDE.md §11).
- [ ] ⬜ **Backend: workspace-admin list-all endpoint** — `GET /admin/suites` · `/admin/users` · `/admin/access` (all-suites / all-users / access overview) behind a new **workspace-admin** authz check (distinct from the per-suite `view < edit < admin < owner` ladder in `suite_authz`). Backward-compatible additive surface; the long-standing **backend block** for the Admin page. _Unblocks the Week-4 ⬜ "Admin page" task._
- [ ] ⬜ **Admin control centre page** (`/admin`, `AdminScreen`) — all suites / users / access overview on the new endpoint, with a **real 403** for non-admins (server-driven, via the workspace-admin check — *not* a client "View as" toggle). _Closes the Week-4 "Admin page — list all suites, all users, access overview" task._
- [ ] ⬜ **Workspace Settings page** (`/settings`, `SettingsScreen`) — the app-shell settings screen. **No settings/preferences backend exists today** (only the `v1/` routers), so v1 ships the page shell + only controls that map to a real backend (e.g. Teams alert webhook config once the Week-6 `ResultPublisher` notification-config UI lands); everything else renders as a clearly-labelled placeholder until a settings API exists. Backend-gated.
- [ ] ⬜ **Dashboard KPI honesty pass** — the Dashboard renders only metrics with a real data model: pass-rate, run counts, and `metric_value`-backed trends (ADR 0012 seam). **Omit "anomalies detected"** (the `anomaly` monitor-kind is reserved, not implemented in v1) and **"avg. time to resolution"** (there is no incident/resolution model). Re-introduce when the monitor kinds / model exist (post-v1 Theme A).
- [ ] ⬜ **Visual-fidelity pass to the design spec** — self-hosted **Inter** + **JetBrains Mono** `@font-face` (if not already wired), motion tokens (120–180ms ease on bg/border/shadow, 0.5px press nudge), the 2px indigo focus ring, hover elevation on interactive cards, and empty/loading states — matched to the prototype's `guidelines/*` foundation cards. Keep using **semantic tokens** so post-v1 dark mode inherits for free.

**Week 7 total: 0 / 34** _(+5 prototype-adoption tasks: workspace-admin endpoint, Admin page, Settings page, Dashboard KPI honesty pass, visual-fidelity pass)_

+### Prototype adoption — backend-gated screens + final polish (added — not in original roadmap) (5 tasks — 0/5)

+> Closes out the prototype after the Week-6 structural pass: the two screens that need backend (**Admin**, **Settings**) plus the final visual-fidelity pass to the design-system guidelines. Admin needs a real **workspace-admin** authz concept (today `admin` is per-suite only) — the prototype's client-side "View as" switch is **not** used (real authz is server-side, CLAUDE.md §11). **To open the prototype, see the *Design source* note in the Week-6 prototype-adoption group** (project `317fec67-2b8a-498c-8f6b-523750916a8d` via the `DesignSync` tool).

+- [ ] ⬜ **Backend: workspace-admin list-all endpoint** — `GET /admin/suites` · `/admin/users` · `/admin/access` (all-suites / all-users / access overview) behind a new **workspace-admin** authz check (distinct from the per-suite `view < edit < admin < owner` ladder in `suite_authz`). Backward-compatible additive surface; the long-standing **backend block** for the Admin page. _Unblocks the Week-4 ⬜ "Admin page" task._ _Design ref: `templates/app/AdminScreen.jsx` (the columns / overview data the page consumes — defines the endpoint's response shape)._

+- [ ] ⬜ **Admin control centre page** (`/admin`, `AdminScreen`) — all suites / users / access overview on the new endpoint, with a **real 403** for non-admins (server-driven, via the workspace-admin check — *not* a client "View as" toggle). _Closes the Week-4 "Admin page — list all suites, all users, access overview" task._ _Design ref: `templates/app/AdminScreen.jsx`; readme §"Templates" ("a demo 'View as' role switch … gates Admin behind a 403 for non-admins" — adopt the 403 page, drop the demo switch)._

+- [ ] ⬜ **Workspace Settings page** (`/settings`, `SettingsScreen`) — the app-shell settings screen. **No settings/preferences backend exists today** (only the `v1/` routers), so v1 ships the page shell + only controls that map to a real backend (e.g. Teams alert webhook config once the Week-6 `ResultPublisher` notification-config UI lands); everything else renders as a clearly-labelled placeholder until a settings API exists. Backend-gated. _Design ref: `templates/app/SettingsScreen.jsx`._

+- [ ] ⬜ **Dashboard KPI honesty pass** — the Dashboard renders only metrics with a real data model: pass-rate, run counts, and `metric_value`-backed trends (ADR 0012 seam). **Omit "anomalies detected"** (the `anomaly` monitor-kind is reserved, not implemented in v1) and **"avg. time to resolution"** (there is no incident/resolution model). Re-introduce when the monitor kinds / model exist (post-v1 Theme A). _Design ref: `templates/app/DashboardScreen.jsx` (the KPI card row — keep pass-rate / runs / trends, drop the two unbacked KPIs)._

+- [ ] ⬜ **Visual-fidelity pass to the design spec** — self-hosted **Inter** + **JetBrains Mono** `@font-face` (if not already wired), motion tokens (120–180ms ease on bg/border/shadow, 0.5px press nudge), the 2px indigo focus ring, hover elevation on interactive cards, and empty/loading states — matched to the prototype's `guidelines/*` foundation cards. Keep using **semantic tokens** so post-v1 dark mode inherits for free. _Design ref: `guidelines/{type-body,type-mono,color-indigo,color-neutrals,color-status,spacing-scale,elevation,radius}.card.html` + `tokens/{fonts,typography,elevation,spacing,colors}.css` + `assets/fonts/`; readme §"Visual foundations" / "Motion" / "Focus" / "Iconography"._
**Week 7 total: 0 / 34** _(+5 prototype-adoption tasks: workspace-admin endpoint, Admin page, Settings page, Dashboard KPI honesty pass, visual-fidelity pass)_

Reproduce with real antd (or a static marketing stack) at that point; the prototype's `MarketingNav.jsx` / `Hero.jsx` / `Features.jsx` / `MarketingClose.jsx` are the layout reference.
402	- [ ] ⬜ **Dark mode** — ship the `[data-theme="dark"]` semantic remap (deep-slate surfaces, lifted status hues for AA contrast) + an opt-in toggle (optional `prefers-color-scheme` auto-switch). **Architecturally ready** — v1 components already reference semantic tokens, so the flip is "zero component changes" *iff* the Week-7 visual-fidelity pass keeps that discipline. v1 ships light-only by decision.

content.text:
Done. All three requests are in [docs/progress.md](docs/progress.md):

## 1. Design-source / fetching details
Added a **"Design source — how to open the prototype"** block in the Week-6 group intro, with everything a task-picker needs:
- Project name **"DataQ Design System"** + `projectId` `317fec67-2b8a-498c-8f6b-523750916a8d`
- How to read it: the `/design-sync` skill / `DesignSync` tool (`list_files` → `get_file`)
- Which key paths matter (`readme.md` = spec, `guidelines/*`, `templates/app/*`, `tokens/*`, and the superseded `uploads/DESIGN.md`)
- ⚠️ A warning that the share link `…/v1/design/h/SVkQJqee7xsc2FNWVOsnIQ` **404s** — use the project via DesignSync, and build in real antd (the `.jsx`/bundle are reference only).

Week 7 and Post-v1 both point back to this note (so it lives in one place, referenced three times).

## 2. Per-task "Design ref" pointers
Every one of the 11 new tasks (+ both Post-v1 items) now ends with an italic `_Design ref: …_` naming the exact prototype file(s) and readme section to consult — e.g.:
- Dashboard → `templates/app/DashboardScreen.jsx` + `data/MetricCard.jsx`/`ProgressBar.jsx`
- Edit flows → `ConnectionFlow.jsx`/`SuiteFlow.jsx`/`CheckFlow.jsx`
- Error pages → `templates/error/index.html` + `feedback/ErrorState.jsx`
- Visual-fidelity → the `guidelines/*.card.html` + `tokens/*.css` set
- Admin/Settings → `AdminScreen.jsx`/`SettingsScreen.jsx`

## 3. Task counts per the doc convention
Both group headings now carry the `(N tasks — X/Y)` form used elsewhere in the file:
- Week 6: `### Prototype adoption — dedicated-page flows + Dashboard landing (added — not in original roadmap) **(6 tasks — 0/6)**`
- Week 7: `### Prototype adoption — backend-gated screens + final polish (added — not in original roadmap) **(5 tasks — 0/5)**`

The week subtotals (`2 / 22`, `0 / 34`) and the Aggregate table (TOTAL **173**) were already updated in the previous round and remain consistent.
